The reason im giving it 3 stars, its because when i joined the game tge first time it was normal so i left the game and few mins later i joined back the game and the leader board in the stump said -loading- and it says 0 players online and i couldnt join a lobby but i played for a tiny bit so 3 stars by the way fix this

There are like 2000 players online per day, one time there was 3800+ players online. You can chose your long arms cus there is 2 buttons + to ajust and - to shrink. The communety is grate i am friends with 2 admins and i got finger painter. The discord is grate and so is the game. You can turn on speed boost and there is a time changer. There are some toxic monkeys but just report them and the admins will instantly see the reports and ban them. Lovley game and communety 5 stars. Most of the players are super nice and friendly but some can be rude. You shuld play it and if not give it a 5 stars. Download the game for free. You get like 1B shiny rocks and if you want every cosmetic just go to the bundel and click by. Working comp compcuorse but stay in defult cus there is the most monkeys. Play tag in forest cus its just sigma. Download thunder running now!!!
